result:
The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been completed successfully. The cleaned dataset has been written to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' with:

- 16,111 cases
- 17 variables including:
  - NSID (cohort member identifier)
  - 9 collapsed tenure variables: hown14, hown15, hown16, hown17, hown18, hown19, hown20, hown25, hown32
  - 7 detailed adolescent tenure variables: hownteen14, hownteen15, hownteen16, hownteen17, hownteen18, hownteen19, hownteen20

All variables have been properly recoded with standardized missing value codes:
- -9 = Refusal
- -8 = Don't know/insufficient information
- -1 = Item not applicable
- -3 = Not asked/participated/interviewed
- -2 = Script error/information lost

Multi-variable tenure indicators at ages 18, 19, and 20 were properly combined by matching label text to the unified scheme.
